comment: Dave came out within 40 minutes on a Sunday evening when our pipe burst. Fixed it quickly and even cleaned up afterwards. Can't recommend highly enough.
Annual service done efficiently. Dave explained everything clearly and the boiler is running much better now. Very reasonable price.
Great job on our new bathroom. Took slightly longer than quoted but the finish is excellent. Would use again.
Professional from start to finish. New consumer unit fitted with minimal disruption. All tested and certified same day.
Installed our EV charger in half a day. Applied for the OZEV grant on our behalf too. Really knowledgeable team.
Full rewire of our 1930s semi. Work was excellent but scheduling took a few attempts. End result is perfect though.
New Worcester boiler installed with 12-year warranty. Green Boiler Co were the cheapest quote AND the most professional. 10/10.
Radiators are finally hot all the way through! Power flush made a massive difference. Engineer was really thorough and explained the process.
Boiler died on the coldest night of the year. Green Boiler Co came out within an hour and had it fixed in 30 minutes. No call-out fee either. Legends.
Built our single-storey extension. Good quality work, came in on budget. A few minor snags but all resolved promptly.
Absolutely transformed our house. The loft conversion is better than we imagined. Team were respectful of our home throughout.
Entire house redecorated in 4 days. Immaculate finish, no mess left behind. Colour advice was really helpful too.
Front of house looks brand new. Good preparation work and quality paint used. Had to wait 2 weeks for a start date but worth it.
Feature wall wallpaper hung perfectly. Pattern matching was spot on. Really pleased with the result — looks like it was always there.
Roof was leaking into the bedroom. Fixed within 3 hours of calling. Temporary repair done same day, permanent fix scheduled for the following week. Great communication.
New EPDM flat roof on our garage. Good workmanship and 20-year guarantee. Scaffolding was up a bit longer than expected.
Locked out at 11pm. Arrived in 20 minutes, opened the door without any damage in under 5 minutes. Fair price and friendly service.
Upgraded all our locks to anti-snap cylinders after a break-in on our street. Feel much safer now. Expert advice on which locks to choose.
Multipoint lock on back door replaced. Door now locks smoothly for the first time in years. Good value for money.
Signed up for monthly cleans. Windows are always sparkling and they're very reliable. Never missed a scheduled clean.
Conservatory roof cleaned inside and out. Looks like new glass now. Took about an hour. Good value.
